title: Review property details and related listings
description: A guest can inspect a property page and see the key details, map location, and similar listings needed to evaluate the home.

steps.description: Navigate to /property/[id]
Verify the property images, key details, map, and similar listings are displayed

title: Access the dashboard after signing in
description: An authenticated user can open the dashboard and see their profile, analytics, listings, favorites, and viewings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the profile information is displayed
Verify analytics, own listings, liked properties, and upcoming viewings are displayed

title: Log in with valid credentials
description: An existing user can sign in successfully and reach the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Sign up for a new account
description: A new visitor can create an account with valid details and receive a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the full name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the phone number field with a valid phone number
Select a gender
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the signup form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Browse listings with filters and see updated results
description: A guest can narrow the property search on the browsing page and see the listing results update to match the selected filters.

steps.description: Navigate to /find-homes
Select a category filter
Select a city filter
Set a price range
Set the number of bedrooms
Apply the filters
Verify the displayed listings reflect the selected filters

title: Approve a pending listing
description: An admin can review pending listings and approve one so the listing status updates in the table.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/dashboard
Log in with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} for the admin role
Select Listings in the entity picker
Filter the listings by pending status
Approve a pending listing
Verify the listing status updates to approved
Verify the approved listing remains visible in the table

title: Open a login-protected dashboard directly
description: A signed-in user can open the protected dashboard route and reach their account area instead of being blocked.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the dashboard content is displayed

title: Open a property from search results
description: A guest can open a listing card from the browsing page and reach the property detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /find-homes
Select a listing card
Verify the property detail page is displayed

title: Contact an agent from a property page with WhatsApp
description: A logged-in user with a phone number can start a WhatsApp lead from a property page and reach the chat handoff.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /property/[id]
Click the WhatsApp contact action
Verify the browser opens the WhatsApp handoff for the property

title: Create a new listing from the dashboard
description: A seller can submit a complete listing and see it appear as pending in their listings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Click the Add Listing control
Fill in a unique listing title into the title field
Select a property type
Select a listing category
Pick a location on the mini-map
Enter a valid price
Enter valid bedroom, bathroom, and size values
Select a furnishing type
Add valid amenities
Enter a description for the listing
Upload listing images
Submit the listing form
Verify the new listing appears in the user's listings
Verify the listing is marked as pending

title: Reject a pending listing with a reason
description: An admin can reject a pending listing by providing a reason and see the listing status update in the table.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/dashboard
Log in with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} for the admin role
Select Listings in the entity picker
Filter the listings by pending status
Reject a pending listing
Fill a rejection reason into the reason field
Verify the listing status updates to rejected
Verify the rejected listing remains visible in the table

title: Protect property contact behind login
description: A guest who tries to contact an agent from a property page is taken to sign in instead of starting a lead.

steps.description: Navigate to /property/[id]
Click the WhatsApp contact action
Verify the login page is displayed

title: Save a listing from browse results
description: An authenticated buyer or renter can favorite a listing from browse results and see the saved state change immediately.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Navigate to /find-homes
Toggle the favorite state on a listing card
Verify the listing is marked as saved
Verify the favorite state is visibly updated

title: Open a similar property from a property page
description: A guest can continue browsing by opening a related listing from the similar listings section on a property page.

steps.description: Navigate to /property/[id]
Select a similar listing card
Verify another property detail page is displayed

title: Review saved listings in the dashboard
description: An authenticated user can open liked properties from the dashboard and see previously saved listings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Navigate to /dashboard
Open the liked properties section
Verify saved listings are displayed
Verify the liked properties section is populated

title: Search homes with natural language from the homepage
description: A guest can enter a natural language housing query on the homepage and reach filtered search results on the browsing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Type a natural language property query into the search field
Submit the search
Verify filtered search results are displayed
Verify the browsing page is shown

title: Change listing sort order
description: A guest can change the sort order on the browsing page and see the visible listings reorder accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /find-homes
Change the sort order
Verify the listings are reordered

title: Search homes with natural language from the browse page
description: A guest can enter a natural language housing query on the browsing page and see the results update to match the search.

steps.description: Navigate to /find-homes
Type a natural language property query into the search field
Submit the search
Verify filtered search results are displayed
Verify the results reflect the search query

title: Require a rejection reason before rejecting
description: An admin cannot complete a listing rejection without entering a reason, and the reason validation is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/dashboard
Log in with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} for the admin role
Select Listings in the entity picker
Filter the listings by pending status
Open the rejection flow for a pending listing
Submit the rejection without entering a reason
Verify a rejection reason validation error is visible
Verify the listing status has not changed

title: Show validation errors for incomplete signup
description: A visitor sees validation errors when submitting the signup form with invalid or missing information.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Submit the signup form without entering details
Verify validation errors are visible

title: Move to the next page of listings
description: A guest can use pagination on the browsing page to view the next set of listings.

steps.description: Navigate to /find-homes
Use the pagination controls to go to the next page
Verify a different set of listings is displayed

title: Open the add listing modal from the dashboard
description: An authenticated user can open the listing creation modal from the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Click the Add Listing control
Verify the listing creation modal is displayed

title: See recommendations on the homepage after login
description: An authenticated user can view personalized recommendations on the homepage and open a suggested property from the section.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Navigate to /
Verify personalized listing recommendations are displayed
Verify a property detail page can be opened from a recommendation card

title: Open recommended property from the homepage
description: An authenticated user can open a recommended property card from the homepage and reach the property detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Navigate to /
Select a recommended listing card
Verify the property detail page is displayed
Verify the selected listing content is shown

title: Show an error for invalid login credentials
description: A visitor sees an error when submitting incorrect login credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with an invalid email address
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Submit the login form
Verify an error message is visible

title: Browse listings from the dashboard favorites section
description: An authenticated user can favorite a listing elsewhere and later find it in their liked properties on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /find-homes
Save a listing as a favorite
Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the liked properties section is displayed
Verify the favorited listing appears in liked properties

title: View and filter captured leads
description: An admin can open the leads table and filter lead records by agency, source, or date range.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/dashboard
Log in with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} for the admin role
Select Leads in the entity picker
View the captured lead records table
Filter leads by agency, source, or date range
Verify lead records are displayed in the table
Verify the filtered lead results are shown

title: Submit lifestyle preferences for compatibility scoring
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can enter lifestyle preferences on a shared housing listing and receive a compatibility result.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click a shared housing property from the browsing results
Fill in the lifestyle preferences field with a clear preference profile
Submit the compatibility form
Verify a compatibility score is displayed
Verify compatibility reasons are displayed

title: View agency profile details and top listings
description: This verifies that an agency detail page shows the agency profile information and its top listings.

steps.description: Navigate to /agencies
Click an agency card
Verify agency profile information is displayed
Verify top listings are displayed

title: View the users table
description: An admin can open the users section and see the users table loaded.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/dashboard
Log in with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} for the admin role
Select Users in the entity picker
Verify the users table is displayed
Verify user records are visible

title: Grant a verified badge to a user
description: An admin can grant a verified badge to a user and see the badge reflected in the users table.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/dashboard
Log in with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} for the admin role
Select Users in the entity picker
Grant a verified badge to a user
Verify the user is marked as verified
Verify the updated user remains visible in the table

title: Browse agency cards and open an agency profile
description: This verifies that a guest can browse the agency directory and open an agency detail page from a card.

steps.description: Navigate to /agencies
Verify agency cards are displayed
Click an agency card
Verify the agency detail page is displayed

title: View compatibility score on a shared housing listing
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can open a shared housing property and see the roommate compatibility widget with a score and reasons.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click a shared housing property from the browsing results
Verify the compatibility score widget is displayed
Verify compatibility reasons are displayed

title: Request a password reset email
description: A visitor can request password recovery from the forgot password page and see a confirmation message.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Submit the reset request form
Verify a confirmation message is visible

title: Show validation when an amenity is rejected
description: A seller sees validation feedback when adding an invalid amenity in the listing form.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Click the Add Listing control
Add an invalid amenity
Verify an amenity validation error is visible

title: Switch between project tabs on an agency profile
description: This verifies that a user can switch project tabs on an agency profile and see the project list update.

steps.description: Navigate to /agencies
Click an agency card
Select a different project tab
Verify the displayed projects change to match the selected tab

title: Show an empty liked properties state
description: An authenticated user with no favorites can open liked properties and see an empty state instead of saved listings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Navigate to /dashboard
Open the liked properties section
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no saved listings are displayed

title: Update compatibility preferences and see the result refresh
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can change their lifestyle preferences on a shared housing listing and get an updated compatibility outcome.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click a shared housing property from the browsing results
Fill in the lifestyle preferences field with one preference profile
Submit the compatibility form
Fill in the lifestyle preferences field with a different preference profile
Submit the compatibility form
Verify an updated compatibility score is displayed
Verify updated compatibility reasons are displayed

title: Browse blog articles and open a full article
description: This verifies that a guest can browse blog cards and open a blog article detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /blog
Verify blog article cards are displayed
Click an article card
Verify the full article page is displayed

title: View compatibility on a shared housing listing through a property page
description: This verifies that a shared housing listing opened from the property route still shows roommate compatibility controls and results.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click a shared housing property from the browsing results
Verify the property page is displayed
Verify the compatibility score widget is displayed

title: Read a blog article and review related articles
description: This verifies that a blog article page shows the article content and related article recommendations.

steps.description: Navigate to /blog
Click an article card
Verify the article content is displayed
Verify related articles are displayed

title: View upcoming viewings on the dashboard
description: An authenticated user can open the dashboard and see their upcoming viewing appointments if they exist.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the upcoming viewings section is displayed

title: Search homes with empty input
description: A guest who submits an empty search sees the browsing page remain usable and no search results are applied.

steps.description: Navigate to /find-homes
Leave the search field empty
Submit the search
Verify the browse page remains visible
Verify no filtered results state is applied

title: See validation when lifestyle preferences are missing
description: This verifies that an authenticated user cannot submit roommate compatibility preferences without providing the required information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click a shared housing property from the browsing results
Submit the compatibility form
Verify a validation error is displayed
Verify no compatibility score is displayed

title: Keep compatibility widget hidden for non-shared housing listings
description: This verifies that a regular property page does not show roommate compatibility controls that only apply to shared housing.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click a non-shared housing property from the browsing results
Verify the property page is displayed
Verify the compatibility score widget is not displayed
